ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Pass, Duel) */,
  "event_sec" REAL /* Timestamp of the event in seconds */,
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the event instance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the event is part of */,
  "match_period" TEXT /* Period of the match (e.g., 1H, 2H) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "positions" TEXT /* Coordinates of player positions involved in the event */,
  "sub_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-event related to the main event */,
  "sub_event_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-event */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the event for classification */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., Successful, Unsuccessful) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the player during the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered by the player during the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "ball_possession" INTEGER /* Whether the team had possession of the ball during the event */,
  "pressure_level" INTEGER /* Level of pressure on the player during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sub_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_event_id") REFERENCES sub_events ("sub_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_tags FOREIGN KEY ("tags") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of team A participating in the match */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of team B participating in the match */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "field_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the playing field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "fitness_level" INTEGER /* Fitness level of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the team in millions */,
  "number_of_titles" INTEGER /* Number of titles won by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_events" (
  "sub_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sub-event */,
  "sub_event_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type this sub-event is related to */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the sub-event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the tag for visual representation */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Whether the tag indicates a critical event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Pass, Duel, Interruption) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the position record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event this position relates to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose position is recorded */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the player's position during the event */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the player at the recorded position */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the player's movement at the recorded position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
